license_notes: Internal GeaSpirit demo output (Sprint 2.3 sample). Do not redistribute without operator sign-off.
disclaimer: DEMO data. Synthetic but plausible prospectivity score for the Forcarei W-Sn district; intended to exercise the geaspirit_prospectivity connector and the geological sub-score bridge. Not a resource declaration and not a financial forecast. Desk-validation candidate only.

records.notes: Centroid placed near historic W-Sn workings; medium-band score reflecting partial signal coverage in the demo only.
Lower-confidence proxy used to test the union-of-signal-families logic in the connector.
